title: PolySim: Deterministic Polynomial Surrogates for Cross-Modal Retrieval on CiM
summary: Cross-modal retrieval on edge devices benefits from probabilistic embeddings that capture semantic uncertainty, but deploying them on compute-in-memory (CiM) hardware remains an open problem. The core difficulty is a sampling gap: probabilistic methods such as PCME rely on Monte Carlo sampling and nonlinear distance evaluation at inference, which are fundamentally incompatible with CiM crossbar arrays that support only deterministic, single-step matrix-vector multiplication. Few existing probabilistic retrieval methods can be executed on a conventional crossbar. To bridge this gap, we propose PolySim, a framework that reformulates probabilistic retrieval into a fully deterministic pipeline. PolySim approximates each Gaussian embedding dimension using low-order polynomial bases and computes similarity via a learnable order-bilinear kernel, eliminating stochastic sampling while preserving distributional information. In experiments on six benchmarks spanning video, image, and audio retrieval, PolySim improves R@1 over deterministic baselines by up to 10.3\% and matches or exceeds PCME, while reducing inference to a single crossbar-compatible matrix-vector multiplication. CrossSim evaluation under realistic device non-idealities confirms robust deployment on conventional crossbar arrays. To the best of our knowledge, PolySim is the first method to enable probabilistic cross-modal retrieval on CiM hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出PolySim，将概率检索转为确定性流水线，适配CiM硬件。
AI.motivation: 概率嵌入方法（如PCME）依赖蒙特卡洛采样和非线性距离评估，与仅支持确定性单步矩阵向量乘的CiM交叉阵列不兼容。
AI.method: 硬件平台：CiM交叉阵列（非Jetson Thor/A100等GPU）；关键技术：低阶多项式基近似高斯嵌入、可学习阶双线性核替代随机采样；实现层级：系统/框架。
AI.result: 在六个基准上R@1比确定性基线提升最多10.3%，匹配或超越PCME；推理简化为单次交叉阵列兼容的矩阵向量乘。
AI.conclusion: PolySim首次实现概率跨模态检索在CiM硬件上的部署。
AI.problem: 概率检索方法无法在仅支持确定性运算的CiM硬件上高效执行。
AI.hardware: 论文摘要未明确（提及CiM交叉阵列，但无具体节点数、GPU型号、互联等）。
AI.comm_mechanism: 论文摘要未明确（不涉及分布式通信）。
AI.memory_kv: 论文摘要未明确（不涉及KV cache）。
AI.key_results: R@1比确定性基线提升最多10.3%；推理简化为单次矩阵向量乘。
AI.baseline: 确定性基线（未具体命名）和PCME。
AI.measurement: 六个跨模态检索基准（视频、图像、音频）；指标R@1；CrossSim模拟真实器件非理想性。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该工作针对CiM硬件而非GPU集群，方法不直接适用于7×Jetson Thor。
AI.infra_assumption: CiM交叉阵列硬件，支持确定性矩阵向量乘。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该工作不涉及多节点互联。
AI.differentiation: 无直接差异化切入点，因论文聚焦不同硬件范式。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文针对CiM硬件，与7×Jetson Thor的GPU集群场景差异大，且不涉及分布式推理、通信或容错。

title: Opto-ViT-v2: Noise-Resilient On-Chip Fine-Tuning for Photonic Near-Sensor Vision Transformer Accelerators
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures. Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Computer-Aided Design (ICCAD 2026)
summary: Silicon-photonic (SiPh) accelerators have emerged as a promising platform for Vision Transformer (ViT) inference by performing matrix multiplications on microring-resonator (MRR) banks with high throughput and energy efficiency. Extending these platforms to support on-chip fine-tuning remains challenging because backpropagation requires large activation storage, frequent weight write-back to MRRs, and tolerance to device-level noise. We present Opto-ViT-v2, the first framework for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) on a near-sensor SiPh ViT accelerator. Our tensorized low-rank decomposition separates pretrained optical weights from a small set of trainable electronic factors (as few as 8K parameters for ViT-Base), greatly reducing activation storage and weight updates while enabling practical on-chip training. We further introduce a gradient-accumulated sparse classifier that freezes low-importance weights through one-shot top-k gradient masking, reducing classifier training cost by about 40 percent. We also develop the first system-level noise model for photonic on-chip training, capturing the effects of MRR crosstalk, thermal drift, and laser amplitude noise during both forward and backward propagation. Calibrated using measurements from more than 200 fabricated MRR devices, the model shows that low-rank factor updates are more robust than full fine-tuning and conventional layer-wise low-rank adaptation under identical noise conditions. Experiments on VTAB-1K (19 tasks) and FGVC few-shot benchmarks demonstrate that Opto-ViT-v2 recovers within 0.3 to 0.8 percent of clean software accuracy under measured photonic noise while achieving more than 100 KFPS/W, enabling practical on-chip domain adaptation for photonic edge vision systems.

AI.tldr: 首个在硅光ViT加速器上实现参数高效微调的框架，抵抗噪声并保持高能效。
AI.motivation: 硅光加速器支持片上微调面临激活存储大、权重回写频繁、器件噪声容忍度低等挑战。
AI.method: 硬件平台：硅光（SiPh）MRR加速器；关键技术：张量化低秩分解（分离预训练光权重与可训练电子因子，仅8K参数）、梯度累积稀疏分类器（top-k梯度掩码冻结低重要性权重）；实现层级：系统级。
AI.result: 在VTAB-1K（19任务）和FGVC小样本基准上，在实测光噪声下恢复至干净软件精度0.3-0.8%以内，能效>100 KFPS/W。
AI.conclusion: Opto-ViT-v2通过低秩分解和噪声建模实现了实用的片上领域自适应。
AI.problem: 硅光加速器上缺乏支持片上微调的系统级框架，尤其是应对噪声和资源限制。
AI.hardware: 硅光MRR加速器（非GPU/边缘SoC），无节点互联信息。
key_results: 在VTAB-1K上，噪声下精度恢复至干净软件精度0.3-0.8%以内
分类器训练成本降低约40%
AI.baseline: 与干净软件精度、全微调及传统逐层低秩适应对比。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：VTAB-1K（19任务）和FGVC小样本基准；指标：精度恢复百分比、能效（KFPS/W）、训练成本降低百分比。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限：硅光加速器与Jetson Thor架构差异大，但低秩分解和噪声建模思路可启发边缘SoC上参数高效微调。
AI.infra_assumption: 硅光MRR加速器，无节点间通信假设。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用：本文不涉及多节点互联。
AI.differentiation: 可探索在7×Thor上应用低秩分解进行参数高效微调，结合边缘噪声特性。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文聚焦硅光加速器，与7×Thor边缘集群分布式推理无直接关联，且无开源代码。

title: AlphaRoute: Large Language Models as Semantic Optimizers for Multi-Objective Routing
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for publication in the IEEE International Conference on LLM-Aided Design, 2026, Stanford University, Stanford, CA, USA. Code available at https://github.com/Kcbir/AlphaRoute
summary: Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) global routing is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem requiring signal net assignment across capacity-constrained 3D grids while minimizing congestion, wirelength, and via transitions. Because traditional heuristics rely on static penalty schedules that fail on complex congestion topologies, we present AlphaRoute: a multi-objective adaptive search framework reformulating rip-up and reroute (R&R) into a dynamic optimization system. We introduce SHAP-based overflow decomposition to isolate per-net congestion, driving targeted subgraph extraction via 3D Dijkstra maze routing and an adaptive PathFinder policy. Crucially, AlphaRoute employs Large Language Models (LLMs) as semantic policy optimizers. Bounded by a deterministic knowledge graph, the LLMs interpret congestion metrics to dynamically adjust penalty parameters. Evaluated on ISPD 2025 benchmarks, AlphaRoute reduces overflow by 98.6% on MEMPOOL. On the constrained ARIANE design, we achieve an overflow of 146,109 (a 29.8x reduction in overflow over the state of the art), yielding a penalized score of S_orig = 0.0538 versus the State-of-the-art (SOTA) 1.780. These results demonstrate that superior algorithmic search geometry can overcome the latency of interpreted Python implementations.

AI.tldr: AlphaRoute用LLM优化VLSI全局布线，非大模型推理。
AI.motivation: 传统VLSI布线启发式在复杂拥塞拓扑上失效，需动态优化。
AI.method: 硬件平台：无；关键技术：LLM作为语义策略优化器、SHAP分解、3D Dijkstra迷宫路由、PathFinder策略；实现层级：算法。
AI.result: 在ISPD 2025基准上，MEMPOOL溢出减少98.6%；ARIANE设计溢出146,109（比SOTA减少29.8x），惩罚分数0.0538 vs SOTA 1.780。
AI.conclusion: 算法搜索几何可克服Python实现延迟。
AI.problem: 论文解决VLSI全局布线问题，非大模型推理系统。
AI.key_results: MEMPOOL溢出减少98.6%；ARIANE溢出146,109（29.8x减少）；惩罚分数0.0538 vs SOTA 1.780。
AI.measurement: 溢出（overflow）、惩罚分数（S_orig），无重复次数或置信区间。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，不涉及分布式推理或通信。
AI.deep_read_reason: 不涉及大模型推理系统，无通信/并行/容错机制，对7×Thor无直接可迁移价值。

title: SynPre-FL: Synthetic data-driven pretraining integrated Federated Learning training framework
summary: Federated learning (FL) offers a promising approach to privacy-preserving clinical risk prediction, but its deployment remains limited by restricted data sharing, client heterogeneity, class imbalance, and the lack of realistic tabular electronic health record (EHR) benchmarks. Synthetic data generation may alleviate data scarcity, yet its integration with federated optimisation has received limited systematic study. We propose SynPre-FL, a unified framework combining high-fidelity synthetic EHR generation with synthetic-pretrained FL for robust prediction under non-IID conditions. A latent autoencoder-diffusion model generates privacy-preserving synthetic cohorts, which are used to warm-start federated training. This pretraining is followed by heterogeneity-aware optimisation using class-balanced local objectives, proximal regularisation, and adaptive server aggregation. Post-hoc calibration and federated-safe explainability support reliable and interpretable risk estimates. Experiments show that the synthetic generator preserves univariate, bivariate, and multivariate structure while protecting against membership-inference and reconstruction attacks. The generated data achieve strong downstream utility under TSTR, TRTS, and model-based evaluations. Across federated settings with 5, 10, and 15 heterogeneous clients, SynPre-FL consistently improves robustness and scalability over baseline methods, especially under severe non-IID fragmentation. Calibration improves probability reliability, while SHAP analysis produces stable and clinically coherent feature attributions across federation sizes. SynPre-FL therefore provides a practical and reproducible framework for combining synthetic data with FL to enable privacy-aware, interpretable, and robust clinical prediction from distributed tabular EHR data.

AI.tldr: 提出SynPre-FL框架，用合成数据预训练提升联邦学习鲁棒性，不涉及大模型推理。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在临床风险预测中受限于数据共享、客户端异质性和类别不平衡，缺乏真实表格EHR基准。
AI.method: 硬件平台未明确；使用潜在自编码器-扩散模型生成合成EHR，结合联邦优化（类平衡目标、近端正则化、自适应聚合）；实现层级为系统/算法。
AI.result: 在5/10/15个异质客户端下，SynPre-FL在非IID场景下鲁棒性和可扩展性优于基线；生成数据保留单/双/多变量结构，防御成员推断和重构攻击。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据预训练可有效提升联邦学习在非IID表格数据上的预测鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.problem: 联邦学习在非IID表格EHR数据上的鲁棒性和可扩展性不足，缺乏合成数据与联邦优化结合的系统研究。
AI.key_results: 1. 生成数据保留单/双/多变量结构；2. 防御成员推断和重构攻击；3. 在5/10/15客户端下，SynPre-FL在非IID场景下鲁棒性和可扩展性优于基线。
AI.baseline: 对比基线方法（未具体命名），在TSTR、TRTS和基于模型的评估下比较。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：5/10/15个异质客户端；负载/数据集：表格EHR数据；指标：数据保真度（单/双/多变量结构）、隐私攻击防御、下游任务性能（TSTR/TRTS）、校准可靠性、SHAP稳定性。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该论文聚焦联邦学习与合成数据，不涉及大模型推理或边缘集群通信。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，论文不涉及NVLink或以太网互联。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文主题为联邦学习与合成数据，不涉及大模型分布式推理、通信优化或边缘集群，对7×Jetson Thor无直接可迁移价值。

title: Fine-grained Computation-Communication Overlap via Tile-level Signaling and Scheduling for Mixture-of-Experts
comment: To appear at the 55th International Conference on Parallel Processing (ICPP 26)
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures increase model capacity without proportionally increasing computation cost and have become a key building block for scaling large language models (LLMs) to trillion-parameter regimes. Efficient deployment of these MoE models relies on distributed execution across multiple GPUs, where each MoE layer involves two all-to-all communications: dispatching tokens to expert ranks and returning the expert outputs to their source ranks. Conventional MoE implementations launch this return all-to-all after expert compute completes, exposing communication latency on the critical path and reducing GPU utilization. We present a fine-grained approach that overlaps expert compute with the second all-to-all via tile-level signaling and scheduling. Our producer-consumer co-design combines: (1) a persistent per-rank computation kernel (producer) that covers all local experts on the rank to eliminate repeated kernel launch overhead and prioritizes remote-critical tiles, and (2) a persistent communication kernel (consumer) on a small dedicated partition of streaming multiprocessors (SMs) that issues segment-granular transfers as tiles become ready. Our co-design avoids intrusive changes to the underlying computation operators or communication primitives, making it practical for improving distributed MoE execution efficiency on multi-GPU systems. On a 4-A100 GPU platform, evaluated on three MoE models against four state-of-the-art MoE systems, our approach achieves up to 2.64x end-to-end speedup and 2.74x MoE-layer speedup. Compared with a conventional non-overlap baseline, our approach consistently improves both operator- and MoE-layer-level performance across varying GEMM shapes, router modes, and a broad range of producer/consumer SM partitions, while preserving correctness.

AI.tldr: 通过细粒度tile级信号与调度，将MoE专家计算与all-to-all通信重叠，提升分布式推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE实现在专家计算完成后才启动返回all-to-all通信，导致通信延迟暴露在关键路径上，降低GPU利用率。
AI.method: 硬件平台：4×A100 GPU；关键技术：tile级信号与调度、生产者-消费者协同设计（持久计算内核+持久通信内核）、SM分区；实现层级：系统/运行时。
AI.result: 在4-A100上，相比四种SOTA MoE系统，端到端加速比最高2.64x，MoE层加速比最高2.74x；相比无重叠基线，各GEMM形状、路由模式、SM分区下性能一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度tile级重叠可有效隐藏MoE中的通信延迟，且无需修改底层算子或通信原语。
AI.problem: MoE层中第二个all-to-all通信（返回专家输出）与专家计算无法重叠，导致通信延迟成为瓶颈。
AI.hardware: 4×A100 GPU，互联方式未明确（推测NVLink），无节点数、以太网信息。
AI.comm_mechanism: MoE中的all-to-all通信，通过tile级信号与调度实现计算与通信重叠，生产者-消费者协同设计。
key_results: 端到端加速比最高2.64x（vs四种SOTA MoE系统）
在不同GEMM形状、路由模式、SM分区下性能一致提升
AI.baseline: 四种SOTA MoE系统（未具名）及无重叠基线
AI.measurement: 4×A100 GPU，三种MoE模型，测量端到端吞吐和MoE层延迟，加速比对比。
AI.value_7xthor: tile级计算-通信重叠思路可迁移至7×Thor，但需考虑以太网带宽低、无NVLink，all-to-all通信开销更大，重叠收益可能受限；可尝试在Thor上实现类似生产者-消费者SM分区。
AI.infra_assumption: 多GPU系统，高带宽互联（如NVLink），SM分区能力。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 部分成立：重叠思想仍有效，但以太网带宽低、延迟高，通信时间占比更大，重叠收益可能降低；需重新评估tile粒度与SM分区策略。
AI.differentiation: 在7×Thor上，可研究低带宽下tile级重叠的收益边界，以及如何结合通信压缩或量化进一步降低通信量。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文针对MoE架构，非通用LLM推理；硬件依赖NVLink和SM分区，7×Thor无NVLink且SM架构不同，直接迁移性有限；但重叠思想有参考价值。

title: Total Variation Distance Estimation in Autoregressive Models
comment: 39 pages, 11 figures, code is available at https://github.com/XunZhiyang/llm-tv-estimation
summary: Modern LLM deployments use a number of implementation choices and inference optimizations (e.g., batching, custom kernels, and quantization) on top of fixed weights, so two engines serving "the same model" can produce meaningfully different distributions. We study the problem of estimating the total variation (TV) distance between two length-$n$ autoregressive distributions to additive error $\varepsilon$, under three access models. (1) Under sample access, we use $\widetilde{O}(n^2 K/\varepsilon^2)$ queries, where $K$ is the maximum support of the next-token distribution. This improves upon the $\widetilde{O}(n^3 m/\varepsilon^5)$-query estimator of Meel et al. (2025), where $m \geq K$ is the total size of the token alphabet. (2) Under logit access, we use $O(n/\varepsilon^2)$ queries, and this is tight. (3) Under noisy logit access, we smoothly interpolate between the above two guarantees: if probability values are given to relative error $σ$, we use $\widetilde{O}((n+n^2σ^2)/\varepsilon^2)$ queries. We complement our theoretical results with an empirical evaluation of our algorithms, for example measuring the distance between SGLang and vLLM serving identical weights. Our experiments highlight the robustness and practicality of estimating the total variation distance, which remains estimable where the KL divergence is infinite. Our code is available at https://github.com/XunZhiyang/llm-tv-estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出三种访问模型下估计LLM自回归分布TV距离的算法，并实证比较SGLang与vLLM。
AI.motivation: 不同推理引擎实现差异导致输出分布不同，需要量化分布差异的方法。
AI.method: 理论算法设计，包括样本访问、logit访问和带噪logit访问下的TV距离估计器；实验在SGLang和vLLM上进行，使用相同权重。
AI.result: 样本访问下使用Õ(n²K/ε²)查询，优于先前Õ(n³m/ε⁵)；logit访问下O(n/ε²)查询且紧；带噪logit访问下Õ((n+n²σ²)/ε²)查询。
AI.conclusion: TV距离在KL散度无穷时仍可估计，且算法实用。
AI.problem: 缺乏有效方法量化不同推理引擎输出分布的差异。
AI.key_results: 样本访问查询复杂度Õ(n²K/ε²)；logit访问查询复杂度O(n/ε²)；带噪logit访问查询复杂度Õ((n+n²σ²)/ε²)。
AI.baseline: 与Meel et al. (2025)的Õ(n³m/ε⁵)查询复杂度对比。
AI.measurement: 理论复杂度分析，实验测量SGLang与vLLM之间的TV距离。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，主要关注分布差异度量而非系统优化。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该工作不依赖硬件互联。
AI.differentiation: 可借鉴其分布差异度量方法评估不同并行策略或通信压缩对输出分布的影响。
AI.deep_read_reason: 该论文为理论/度量工作，不涉及系统优化或硬件实现，对7×Thor直接价值有限。

title: OLEDLM: A Unified Language Model for OLED Molecular Design
summary: The development of organic light-emitting diode (OLED) materials faces the compounded challenges of an astronomically large chemical space, stringent quantum-chemical constraints, and a scarcity of labeled data. Although the question of OLED generation is important, few models have been trained effectively for this specific domain. We propose an inverse molecular design framework based on causal language models: given target optoelectronic properties (e.g., excitation energy, oscillator strength), our model directly generates OLED SMILES sequences satisfying the specified constraints. We employ a multi-stage strategy: first, we establish a foundational chemical language model using a LLaMA-style transformer architecture. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first successful adaptation of LLMs specifically for the OLED domain, bridging the gap between generic molecular generation and the stringent structural requirements of optoelectronic materials. Second, we fine-tune property predictors based on a BERT model pre-trained on our large-scale OLED dataset. Then, we perform Reinforcement Learning on our fine-tuned model, leveraging our property predictor, for better SMILES generation. Finally, through DFT verification, we demonstrate that our framework can efficiently navigate the OLED chemical space, generating novel candidates with high structural validity and optimized optoelectronic properties.

AI.tldr: 用因果语言模型生成满足光电性质的OLED分子，多阶段训练+强化学习。
AI.motivation: OLED材料设计面临化学空间巨大、量子化学约束严格、标注数据稀缺的问题，现有模型在该领域训练不足。
AI.method: 基于LLaMA架构的因果语言模型，结合BERT属性预测器，通过多阶段训练（预训练+微调+强化学习）生成OLED SMILES序列，最后用DFT验证。
AI.result: 论文摘要未明确具体量化结果，仅称能高效导航OLED化学空间，生成高结构有效性和优化光电性质的新候选分子。
AI.conclusion: 提出的逆分子设计框架可有效生成满足指定光电性质的OLED分子。
AI.problem: 缺乏针对OLED领域的有效分子生成模型，现有通用分子生成方法难以满足OLED的严格结构要求。
AI.key_results: 论文摘要未明确具体数字，仅定性描述。

title: BaseRT: Advancing Best-in-Class LLM Inference with Apple M5 Neural Accelerators
summary: Apple's M5 generation introduces a redesigned GPU architecture in which every core carries a dedicated Neural Accelerator: on-die matrix units exposed through the Metal~4 tensor API. We show that BaseRT, our native Metal inference runtime for large language models on Apple Silicon, exploits these units to push inference throughput on Apple hardware substantially beyond both llama.cpp and MLX. Building on BaseRT's framework-free design, we add a family of hand-written Metal~4 tensor-core kernels (including dense and mixture-of-experts GEMM and flash-attention prefill kernels) that route the compute-bound matrix multiplications of inference through the M5 Neural Accelerators while leaving the memory-bound decode path on our existing specialised kernels. On an Apple M5 Pro, across fifteen model configurations spanning the Qwen3, Qwen3.5/3.6, Llama~3.2, and Gemma~4 families from sub-1B to 35B parameters, BaseRT delivers up to $6.4\times$ higher prompt-processing throughput than llama.cpp and $3.9\times$ higher than MLX, with the largest margins on the mixture-of-experts models where matrix multiplication dominates, while maintaining its lead on decode of up to $1.75\times$ over llama.cpp and $1.33\times$ over MLX. These results establish a new performance ceiling for on-device LLM inference and show that the M5's tensor cores are the decisive lever for prompt processing on Apple Silicon. BaseRT is publicly available at https://github.com/basecompute/baseRT.

AI.tldr: BaseRT利用M5神经加速器，在Apple Silicon上实现6.4倍于llama.cpp的推理吞吐。
AI.motivation: 现有推理运行时（llama.cpp、MLX）未充分利用Apple M5 GPU的专用神经加速器（tensor cores），导致推理吞吐受限。
AI.method: 硬件平台：Apple M5 Pro（集成神经加速器）；关键技术：手写Metal 4张量核kernel（密集/MoE GEMM、flash-attention prefill），计算密集型矩阵乘法路由至神经加速器，内存密集型decode路径保留原有kernel；实现层级：算子/系统。
AI.result: 在15种模型配置（Qwen3、Llama 3.2等，<1B-35B）上，BaseRT的prompt处理吞吐最高达llama.cpp的6.4倍、MLX的3.9倍；decode吞吐最高达llama.cpp的1.75倍、MLX的1.33倍。
AI.conclusion: M5的tensor cores是Apple Silicon上prompt处理的关键杠杆，BaseRT建立了设备端LLM推理的新性能上限。
AI.problem: 在Apple M5的专用神经加速器上，缺乏针对LLM推理的高效kernel实现，导致计算资源未充分利用。
AI.hardware: 单节点Apple M5 Pro（集成神经加速器），互联未提及。

decode吞吐：BaseRT vs llama.cpp最高1.75倍，vs MLX最高1.33倍

AI.measurement: 实验配置：Apple M5 Pro，15种模型（Qwen3、Llama 3.2等，<1B-35B）；指标：prompt处理吞吐（token/s）、decode吞吐（token/s）；未提及重复次数与置信区间。

title: Classical Hardware Acceleration of Quantum Autoencoders for Real-Time Anomaly Detection in Collider Experiments
summary: Quantum machine learning (QML) algorithms in high energy physics (HEP) can efficiently represent and leverage long-range, high-order correlations in high-dimensional collider data, potentially with fewer parameters and favorable scaling relative to classical models. Deployment of QML in real-time collider applications such as trigger systems requires the ability to emulate and compile quantum circuits classically, then synthesize the resulting quantum gates onto low-latency hardware accelerators, namely field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). We present a study of variational quantum autoencoder models for real-time anomaly detection triggers in modern collider experiments. The models achieve performance comparable to state-of-the-art classical approaches and, after FPGA synthesis, satisfy resource usage and timing constraints consistent with trigger applications in future colliders. This work provides one of the first FPGA implementations of QML models for HEP triggers, enabling higher-capability models in today's classical data acquisition pipelines while advancing quantum readiness of collider experiment infrastructure.

AI.tldr: QML用于高能物理实时触发，FPGA实现达到经典方法性能。
AI.motivation: 解决QML在实时触发系统中的低延迟部署问题，需在FPGA上高效实现量子电路。
AI.method: 硬件平台：FPGA；关键技术：变分量子自编码器、量子电路编译与合成；实现层级：硬件加速器。
AI.result: 性能与经典方法相当，FPGA资源使用和时序满足未来对撞机触发约束。
AI.conclusion: 首次在FPGA上实现QML用于HEP触发，兼顾性能与实时性。
AI.problem: QML在实时触发中的低延迟部署缺乏硬件实现验证。
AI.key_results: 1. QML模型性能与经典方法相当；2. FPGA合成后资源使用和时序满足触发应用约束。

AI.measurement: 实验配置：现代对撞机触发系统；指标：性能（与经典方法比较）、FPGA资源使用、时序约束。

title: NMR Elucidation as an Agentic Search Problem, Not a Modeling Problem
summary: Structural elucidation from Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) data remains a fundamental bottleneck across chemistry, materials science, and biology. We demonstrate that an agentic AI system can perform this task at a level comparable to graduate-level chemistry students. Instead of training a model to directly map spectra to structures, we build a single autonomous agent, backed by a frozen LLM, that interacts with a curated environment with access to domain-specific processing tools, validation checks, tabulated chemical shifts, and instructions that outline the stepwise nature of a chemist's thinking process. On the Alberts dataset, our agent elucidates structures with a top-1 accuracy of 71%, comparable to the performance of graduate students at 66% top-1 accuracy. On the van Bramer and AstraZeneca datasets, our agent achieved 80% and 20% top-1 accuracy respectively, outperforming zero-shot end-to-end deep learning models which were trained on large datasets of simulated spectra. These results show that reframing NMR elucidation as an LLM-guided constrained search, rather than a modeling task, yields substantial gains and suggests a path toward multi-step orchestration frameworks that integrate a variety of tools, models, and domain knowledge to assist in automating spectroscopic analysis.

AI.tldr: LLM代理通过工具调用和逐步推理实现NMR结构解析，性能接近研究生。
AI.motivation: NMR数据解析是化学、材料科学和生物学的瓶颈，现有深度学习方法依赖大量模拟数据且泛化不足。
AI.method: 构建单一自主代理，基于冻结LLM，集成领域工具（处理、验证、化学位移表）和逐步推理指令，在Alberts等数据集上评估。
AI.result: Alberts数据集top-1准确率71%（研究生66%），van Bramer 80%，AstraZeneca 20%，优于零样本端到端模型。
AI.conclusion: 将NMR解析重构为LLM引导的约束搜索可显著提升性能，为多步编排框架提供路径。
AI.problem: NMR结构解析自动化程度低，现有模型依赖模拟数据且缺乏领域知识整合。
key_results: 优于零样本端到端深度学习模型
AI.baseline: 研究生表现（66% top-1）和零样本端到端深度学习模型。
AI.measurement: 数据集：Alberts、van Bramer、AstraZeneca；指标：top-1准确率。

title: REGEN: Replay-recycling for Expert-to-Generalist distillation with Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large-scale online reinforcement learning (RL) is the predominant means of eliciting advanced abilities including long-term reasoning and agentic tool use in large language models (LLMs). However, continuing to scale it across vast task domains of interest remains challenging in both computational infrastructure and cost, especially when considering RL as merely a one-off learning stage. Recently, a widely used technique for distilling knowledge across various domains and training stages, multi-teacher on-policy distillation (MOPD), helps to decouple the RL stage, saving costs, while maintaining generality across vast domains. Nonetheless, similar to online RL, MOPD requires coupled inference and backward passes, which continues to limit its scalability and computational efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose REGEN: Replay-recycling for Expert-to-Generalist Distillation with Offline RL. Instead of distilling from multiple teacher models, REGEN trains a generalist by simply recycling the replay memory -- the free by-product of the teachers' specialized RL training -- and employing offline RL algorithms. REGEN completely decouples the rollout sampling from the backward training process and thus greatly reduces the training cost. Across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and instruction following, REGEN matches the accuracy of MOPD at substantially lower cost. It potentially turns online RL into a data synthesis process instead of a one-off learning stage, and can potentially be extended to large-scale post-training without requiring heavy computational load.

AI.tldr: REGEN通过离线RL重用回放记忆，降低大规模在线RL训练成本。
AI.motivation: 大规模在线RL在LLM中成本高、扩展难，多教师在线蒸馏仍耦合推理与反向传播，限制效率。
AI.method: 提出REGEN，利用教师RL训练产生的回放记忆作为离线数据，采用离线RL算法训练通用模型，完全解耦采样与训练。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成、指令跟随任务上，REGEN匹配MOPD的准确率，但训练成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: REGEN将在线RL转化为数据合成过程，可扩展至大规模后训练而无需高计算负载。
AI.problem: 在线RL和多教师蒸馏在扩展至大规模任务域时计算成本高、效率低。
key_results: 在数学推理、代码生成、指令跟随任务上，REGEN准确率与MOPD相当
训练成本显著低于MOPD（具体数值未给出）

title: Autonomous Collaborative Learning Among an Ensemble of Tsetlin Machines with Consensus-Based Inference
summary: Tsetlin Machine (TM) is a rule-based machine-learning algorithm comprising collectives of two-action Tsetlin Automata (TAs) that cooperatively form conjunctive logical clauses from Boolean inputs through stochastic feedback. Although few recent studies have examined TM Federated Learning, the broader area of distributed and decentralized TM learning has not received much attention in the existing literature and warrants further exploration. In this work, we propose a paradigm for decentralized collaborative learning under a vertical feature-partitioning setting among an ensemble of Tsetlin Machines using consensus-based inference. Within this decentralized paradigm, each agent maintains its own private TM model, and there is no exchange of raw data among agents. Inference combines individual agents model predictions into a global consensus. The paradigm accommodates heterogeneous TM-based agents with differing data acquisition means, local data distributions, or computational resources, thereby facilitating the integration and fusion of information in settings such as multi-modal sensing environments. Experiments conducted using two-dimensional grid and connected graph network topologies demonstrate that the classification accuracies achieved are comparable to those of centralized models.

AI.tldr: 提出基于共识的垂直特征分割Tsetlin Machine去中心化协作学习范式。
AI.motivation: 现有Tsetlin Machine联邦学习研究有限，缺乏分布式去中心化学习范式。
AI.method: 硬件平台未明确；关键技术为基于共识的推理，结合垂直特征分割和去中心化协作；实现层级为系统/算法。
AI.result: 在二维网格和连通图拓扑上，分类准确率与集中式模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化Tsetlin Machine协作学习在垂直分割场景下可行且准确率接近集中式。
AI.problem: 缺乏针对Tsetlin Machine在垂直特征分割下的去中心化协作学习范式。
AI.comm_mechanism: 基于共识的推理，无原始数据交换，垂直特征分割。
AI.key_results: 在二维网格和连通图拓扑上，分类准确率与集中式模型相当。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：二维网格和连通图网络拓扑；负载/数据集未明确；指标：分类准确率。

title: Revisiting Hardware Priority Queue Architectures
comment: In 2025 Open-Source Computer Architecture Research Workshop (OSCAR), June 2025
summary:
Priority queues - data structures that serve elements based on priority rather than insertion order - are fundamental in a wide range of applications, including operating systems, graph algorithms, and data compression. Software implementations, typically based on binary heaps with O(log N) complexity, are sufficient for many scenarios; however they can become performance bottlenecks in latency-sensitive domains such as networking and robotics. Hardware-based priority queues exploit parallelism to significantly reduce operation latency, delivering critical performance improvements in latency-sensitive applications.
  Despite the breadth of prior work on hardware priority queues, two major challenges remain. First, many foundational architectures were proposed and studied years ago, calling into question their relevance given modern hardware advancements. Second, comprehensive comparisons across different architectures are lacking, making it difficult to evaluate trade-offs in performance, resource utilization, and scalability. This paper addresses both gaps by implementing and evaluating several representative hardware priority queue architectures on modern FPGA platforms and providing a quantitative analysis to guide future design choices. All implementations, tests, and analyses are available through our open-source library at https://github.com/realise-lab/hwpq.

AI.tldr: 在FPGA上评估多种硬件优先队列架构，提供开源库。
AI.motivation: 硬件优先队列在延迟敏感场景中重要，但缺乏现代FPGA上的全面比较。
AI.method: 在FPGA上实现并评估多种硬件优先队列架构，开源库提供实现和测试。
AI.result: 提供性能、资源利用率和可扩展性的定量分析，具体数字未在摘要中给出。
AI.conclusion: 硬件优先队列在FPGA上可显著降低延迟，但需根据场景选择架构。

title: Efficient Clustering with Provable Guardrails for LLM Inference at Scale
comment: Accepted for presentation at ICML HiLD workshop 2026 (non-archival)
summary: Scaling LLM-based applications to millions of users is bottlenecked by the inference cost and latency of modern foundation models. A natural fix is to cluster the inputs and call the LLM only on cluster representatives, letting other members inherit the output -- but this is only safe if each member is measurably close to its representative. Existing clustering methods do not offer such per-sample quality control at scale: none jointly guarantee a minimal within-cluster similarity, exact matching of categorical attributes, and scalability to tens of millions of samples. We propose a two-stage algorithm that generates initial clusters with Mini-batch K-Means, then greedily selects representatives within each initial cluster -- a step equivalent to the Johnson-Chvatal heuristic for Set Cover over alpha-balls in embedding space. The algorithm enforces the similarity and attribute guardrails exactly by construction, and runs in $O(nd + n^2 d/K)$ time and $O(nd + n^2/K^2)$ memory for $n$ samples, feature dimension $d$, and $K$ initial clusters -- linear in $n$ when $K$ grows proportionally with $n$. We provide benchmarks against common clustering methods on internal and public datasets: our method not only delivers per-sample guardrails but also runs 10-1000x faster and scales to data sizes where most standard methods become intractable. Deployed on 38 million customers for a persona-based recommender, the clustering method cut downstream cost and latency by 50-fold while preserving personalization and unblocked the production launch.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段聚类算法，在保证样本级相似度和属性匹配的同时，实现10-1000倍加速，用于LLM推理成本优化。
AI.motivation: LLM推理成本高，通过输入聚类让代表样本生成输出，但现有方法无法在大规模下保证每个样本与代表样本的相似度。
AI.method: 两阶段算法：Mini-batch K-Means初始聚类，然后贪心选择代表（等价于Set Cover启发式），强制相似度和属性约束。算法复杂度O(nd + n^2 d/K)，内存O(nd + n^2/K^2)。
AI.result: 在内部和公开数据集上，相比常见聚类方法，运行速度快10-1000倍，扩展到标准方法不可行的数据规模。在3800万客户部署中，下游成本和延迟降低50倍。
AI.conclusion: 该聚类方法能在保证质量的同时大幅降低LLM推理成本，适合大规模部署。
AI.problem: 现有聚类方法无法在大规模（千万级样本）下同时保证每个样本与代表样本的相似度、精确匹配分类属性，且可扩展性差。
key_results: 运行速度比常见聚类方法快10-1000倍
可扩展到标准方法不可行的数据规模
在3800万客户部署中，下游成本和延迟降低50倍

title: Odin: Primitive-Level Synchronization for Distributed Point-Based Neural Rendering
comment: Accepted at HPDC 26 (Poster), further submission in progress
summary: Point-based neural rendering (PBNR) represents 3D scenes as explicit, trainable primitives and underpins high-quality reconstruction and emerging embodied AI and world-model pipelines. Unlike layer-structured neural networks, PBNR has primitive-indexed dependencies: each view reads and updates only a sparse, view-dependent subset of mutable scene state. As large scenes require distributed training and optimized renderers reduce per-view computation, global task- or iteration-level barriers increasingly place synchronization, rather than rendering, on the critical path. We present Odin, a distributed PBNR training system that replaces global barriers with primitive-level synchronization. Its ahead-of-time scheduler uses stable locality and phase order to identify low-conflict overlap windows, while the runtime validates primitive publication before later work observes mutable state. Odin provides a quality-first path that preserves synchronized-training visibility and a throughput-first path that uses overlap and gradient evidence to admit only small, low-impact delayed reads; structural changes and high-impact cases remain synchronized. Across four existing PBNR pipelines and 13 non-city scenes on 8 GPUs, Odin improves throughput by 1.22 times on average and hides 82% of critical-path wait while preserving reconstruction quality. In a MatrixCity mixed-parallel case study scaling to 64 GPUs, Odin improves throughput over Grendel by up to 1.89 times without changing renderer kernels, optimizers, training budgets, or model capacity.

AI.tldr: Odin通过原语级同步消除全局屏障，提升分布式PBNR训练吞吐。
AI.motivation: 分布式PBNR训练中全局同步屏障成为关键路径瓶颈，而非渲染本身。
AI.method: 硬件平台：8-64 GPU（未具体型号）；关键技术：原语级同步、提前调度器（利用稳定局部性和相位顺序识别低冲突重叠窗口）、运行时验证原语发布；实现层级：系统。
AI.result: 8 GPU上吞吐提升1.22倍，隐藏82%关键路径等待；64 GPU混合并行中吞吐比Grendel提升1.89倍。
AI.conclusion: 原语级同步可有效消除分布式PBNR训练中的全局屏障开销。
AI.problem: 分布式PBNR训练中全局屏障导致同步开销成为瓶颈，缺乏细粒度同步机制。
AI.hardware: 8-64 GPU（未具体型号），互联未明确。
AI.comm_mechanism: 原语级同步，无全局屏障；提前调度器实现通信与计算重叠。
AI.key_results: 8 GPU上吞吐提升1.22倍，隐藏82%关键路径等待；64 GPU混合并行中吞吐比Grendel提升1.89倍。
AI.baseline: 对比Grendel（分布式PBNR训练系统），8 GPU和64 GPU场景。
AI.measurement: 吞吐（单位未明确），13个非城市场景，8 GPU；MatrixCity混合并行64 GPU。
AI.value_7xthor: 原语级同步思想可借鉴，但需适配无NVLink的以太网环境，评估通信延迟影响。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 部分成立，但原语级同步依赖低延迟通信，无NVLink下延迟更高，效果可能减弱。
AI.differentiation: 在7×Thor上测量全局屏障开销，设计针对以太网的低延迟同步机制。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文针对PBNR训练，非LLM推理，且硬件互联未明确，对7×Thor直接迁移价值有限。

title: Fully Dynamic Rooted Spanning Tree on GPU
summary: Spanning trees are fundamental structures in graph theory, essential for various applications such as network maintenance, routing adjustments, and many more. The dynamic nature of real-world networks requires efficient updates to these structures as the underlying graph evolves. Maintaining rooted spanning trees dynamically is particularly crucial for algorithms addressing 2-connected components and minimum-weighted spanning trees. In this paper, we address the challenge of maintaining a rooted spanning forest when a batch of edges are inserted or deleted. We present four novel fully dynamic parallel algorithms to update the spanning forest without reconstructing it from scratch. To the best of our knowledge, parallel algorithms for this problem remain largely unexplored. Our experiments on a diverse collection of real-world graphs using a GPU environment demonstrate a throughput of 2 million insertions and 1.4 million deletions per second, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art parallel static algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出GPU上动态并行算法维护生成森林，吞吐达200万插入/秒。
AI.motivation: 动态图需要高效更新生成树，现有并行算法缺乏探索。
AI.method: 在GPU上实现四种全动态并行算法，处理边批量插入/删除，无需从头重建。
AI.result: 吞吐量：200万插入/秒，140万删除/秒，优于静态并行算法。
AI.conclusion: 动态并行算法在GPU上显著提升生成森林维护效率。
AI.problem: 动态图生成树维护的并行算法在GPU上未被充分研究。
AI.key_results: 吞吐量：200万插入/秒，140万删除/秒。
AI.baseline: 与最先进的并行静态算法对比。
AI.measurement: 实验在真实世界图数据集上，GPU环境，测量插入/删除吞吐量。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该论文聚焦图算法而非大模型推理。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该论文不涉及分布式推理。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文主题为图算法，与用户研究方向（大模型分布式推理）无关。

title: Black-Box Performance Evaluation of Elastic Block Storage: Contract, Rate-Limiting Model, and Software Exploration
summary:
Elastic block storage (EBS) with the storage-compute disaggregated architecture is a key component in modern cloud infrastructure. EBS offers users storage resources in the form of elastic solid-state drives (ESSDs). Nonetheless, despite recent efforts that have documented EBS architectures from the provider's perspective, how ESSDs perform differently from local SSDs and how host software should adapt accordingly have not been sufficiently studied.
  In this paper, we conduct a user-centric, black-box performance characterization of ESSDs from Amazon AWS and Alibaba Cloud. We make three main contributions: (1) an ESSD contract that presents four behavioral observations and five actionable implications for software adaptation, (2) a refined I/O rate-limiting model combining bandwidth-IOPS dual limiting and fine-grained token refilling to suppress latency spikes, and (3) a case study on RocksDB that derives four guidelines on cache management, I/O regulation, storage budget utilization, and compression algorithms. Collectively, we hope these contributions can serve as a practical reference for EBS users to understand and exploit the distinctive performance properties of ESSDs.

AI.tldr: 用户视角下弹性块存储（ESSD）性能特征刻画与软件适配建议。
AI.motivation: ESSD与本地SSD性能差异未被充分研究，缺乏用户视角的软件适配指导。
AI.method: 对AWS和阿里云ESSD进行黑盒性能测试，提出ESSD契约（4个行为观察+5个软件适配建议），建立I/O限速模型（带宽-IOPS双限+细粒度令牌补充），并在RocksDB上验证。
AI.result: 提出ESSD契约和I/O限速模型，RocksDB案例给出4条指南（缓存管理、I/O调节、存储预算、压缩算法）。
AI.conclusion: ESSD性能特征与本地SSD不同，软件需针对性适配以优化性能。
AI.problem: 缺乏用户视角的ESSD性能特征刻画和软件适配方法。
AI.key_results: 1. 提出ESSD契约，包含4个行为观察和5个软件适配建议；2. 建立I/O限速模型；3. RocksDB案例给出4条性能优化指南。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，ESSD性能特征与边缘集群分布式推理场景差异较大。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该论文不涉及NVLink或以太网互联。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文聚焦云存储性能，与边缘集群大模型推理的通信、调度、容错问题无关。
